description: Returns a list of project-level snapshots for both project status and ad hoc. You can filter by type.

parameters.name: filters[budget_template_id]
parameters.description: Return snapshot(s) using the specified budget template id.

parameters.name: filters[budget_view_id]
parameters.description: Return snapshot(s) using the specified budget view id. (This will replace budget_template_id filter)

parameters.name: filters[snapshot_type]
parameters.description: Return snapshot(s) of the specified type.

parameters.name: filters[approval_status]
parameters.description: Return snapshot(s) in the specified status.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Direction (asc/desc) can be controlled by the presence or absence of '-' before the sort parameter
